title: BEM-844 route after response check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 01:07 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem843_verify_real_response_after_retry.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='next_process_real_claude_response'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
else:
    status='next_patch_claude_dispatcher_response_writer'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher workflow to always create explicit runtime failure/result file and require Claude output path'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'runtime_outcome':prev.get('runtime_outcome'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843_response_check.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_route_after_bem843_response_check.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Route After BEM-843 Response Check | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Previous: '+str(ps)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843_response_check.json','governance/reports/bem844_route_after_bem843_response_check.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-843 real Claude response check: either process response or patch dispatcher response writer')
"""
